compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect ui-designer agent architecture
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md agent routing table to include dso:ui-designer. Update SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md if design-wireframe is referenced. Update any nesting documentation to reflect the resolved architecture.
**Why**: After this epic, the design pipeline uses an agent instead of a nested skill — existing documentation describing the old architecture becomes misleading.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md agent table (add ui-designer entry); SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md (remove design-wireframe references, add ui-designer); nesting-related documentation
- OUT: Creating new documentation files; updating design-wireframe SKILL.md (handled by redirect stub story)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md agent routing table includes dso:ui-designer with its model and dispatch context
  ← Satisfies: Documentation accuracy after architecture change
- When this story is complete, existing project documentation accurately describes the agent-based design pipeline

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting and conventions

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Done definition update: When this story is complete, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (Used by: /dso:design-wireframe references), component-discovery-schema.json (design-wireframe in description), and REVIEWER-FILE-CHECKLIST.md (design-wireframe as reference implementation) all reflect the new ui-designer agent architecture.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
